item.title: About
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Our Story

BUILT FOR
RESULTS.

Who We Are

MORE THAN
JUST A GYM.

EP Fitness Personal Training is Wichita's premier personal training company, serving the metro area across 3 locations. We specialize in 1-on-1 and semi-private personal training for adults who want real, lasting results.

Our coaches are passionate, certified, and dedicated to your success. Every member gets a fully customized program built around their goals, schedule, and fitness level ? with consistent coaching every step of the way.

Start Training Today
Our Philosophy

THE EP FITNESS
DIFFERENCE.

01

REAL COACHES

Every EP coach is a certified professional who has studied your program before your first session. No rotation, no substitutes.

02

REAL PLANS

No templates. Every program is built from scratch around your body composition, goals, and weekly availability.

03

REAL RESULTS

We measure everything ? body comp, strength benchmarks, habits. Because accountability without data is just hope.

Meet The Team

YOUR COACHES.
YOUR CHAMPIONS.

COACH CODY WEBER

Founder & Head Coach

NASM-CPT ú Precision Nutrition L1 ú 10+ yrs

Wichita's most sought-after personal trainer. Coach Cody built EP Fitness around one belief: every person deserves a real coach, a real plan, and real results ? not a generic template.

COACH LILLIAN

Performance Coach

FMS Certified ú Corrective Exercise Specialist

Specializes in functional movement, injury prevention, and building long-term sustainable fitness habits for busy professionals.

COACH THOMAS

Strength & Conditioning

CSCS ú Sports Performance Specialist

Expert in strength and conditioning, sports performance, and helping clients break through plateaus with science-backed programming.

Start Today

READY TO JOIN
THE EP FAMILY?

Get Your Free Consultation

item.title: Contact
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Get In Touch

CONTACT
US.

?

FREE CONSULTATION

A 30-minute strategy session at no cost

?

24HR RESPONSE

We get back to you the same business day

?

NO COMMITMENT

No contracts. Start when you're ready.

Reach Out

LET'S BUILD YOUR
PROGRAM.

Ready to start? Fill out the form or reach us directly. We'll get back to you within 24 hours to schedule your free consultation and build a custom program around your goals.

Phone: (316) 315-9190

Email: coachweber@epathlete.com

Locations: Andover ú Maize ú East Wichita

[lc_form id='5ng22bigdiwqMETvFPGU' title='EP Fitness - Landing Page - New Form' ]

item.title: 1-on-1 Personal Training
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
EP Fitness

THE MOST EFFECTIVE WAY
TO CHANGE YOUR BODY.

One coach. One program. One goal: yours.

What Is It

1-ON-1 PERSONAL
TRAINING.

WHO IS IT FOR?

  • Adults 35+ ready to stop guessing and start progressing
  • Beginners who want expert guidance from day one
  • Experienced lifters who've plateaued
  • Anyone who's failed at generic gym plans or solo work
Start Training Today

WHAT'S INCLUDED

  • Comprehensive body composition assessment
  • 100% customized training program
  • Weekly check-ins with your coach
  • Nutrition guidance and meal planning support
  • Progress tracking and program adjustments
  • Flexible scheduling ? morning, evening, weekends
  • No contracts required
Start Today

READY TO
GET STARTED?

Get Your Free Consultation

item.title: Semi-Private Training
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
EP Fitness

COACHING. COMMUNITY.
ACCOUNTABILITY.

Small groups. Personalized programming. Real results.

What Is It

SEMI-PRIVATE
TRAINING.

WHO IS IT FOR?

  • People who thrive with group energy and accountability
  • Those looking for quality coaching at a lower price point
  • Anyone ready to be part of a small, motivated group
  • Those who want community without sacrificing personalization
Start Training Today

WHAT'S INCLUDED

  • Small groups ? maximum 6 people per session
  • Personalized programming within the group format
  • Community energy and accountability
  • Coach-supervised every session
  • Customized progressions for each member
  • Multiple session times available
  • No contracts required
Start Today

READY TO
GET STARTED?

Get Your Free Consultation

item.title: Online Training
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
EP Fitness

EXPERT COACHING.
ANYWHERE YOU ARE.

Your program. Your schedule. Your coach.

What Is It

ONLINE
TRAINING.

WHO IS IT FOR?

  • Busy professionals who travel frequently
  • People outside the Wichita metro who want EP coaching
  • Those who prefer training at home or a gym of their choice
  • Anyone who wants expert programming without scheduling constraints
Start Training Today

WHAT'S INCLUDED

  • Fully customized training program
  • Delivered via easy-to-use training app
  • Regular check-ins via video or messaging
  • Nutrition coaching and guidance
  • Form review via video submission
  • Program updated every 4-6 weeks
  • No contracts required
Start Today

READY TO
GET STARTED?

Get Your Free Consultation

item.title: Locations
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: Choose your nearest EP Fitness location.

item.title: Andover
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Location

TRAIN AT EP FITNESS
ANDOVER.

Location Details

EP FITNESS
ANDOVER.

Our Andover location serves the fastest-growing community in the metro. Located on N Andover Rd, we train members from Andover, Augusta, and surrounding areas.

Address: 618 N Andover Rd, Andover, KS 67002

Phone: (316) 315-9190

Email: coachweber@epathlete.com

Start Training Here

SERVICES AVAILABLE

  • 1-on-1 Personal Training
  • Semi-Private Training (max 6)
  • Online Training
  • Body Composition Assessment
  • Nutrition Coaching
Start Today

TRAIN IN
ANDOVER.

Get Your Free Consultation

item.title: Maize
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Location

TRAIN AT EP FITNESS
MAIZE.

Location Details

EP FITNESS
MAIZE.

The Maize location sits in northwest Wichita ? a short drive from Goddard, Colwich, and the northwest side. Private facility, focused training environment.

Address: Maize, Kansas ? Wichita Metro Area

Phone: (316) 315-9190

Email: coachweber@epathlete.com

Start Training Here

SERVICES AVAILABLE

  • 1-on-1 Personal Training
  • Semi-Private Training (max 6)
  • Online Training
  • Body Composition Assessment
  • Nutrition Coaching
Start Today

TRAIN IN
MAIZE.

Get Your Free Consultation

item.title: East Wichita
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Location

TRAIN AT EP FITNESS
EAST WICHITA.

Location Details

EP FITNESS
EAST WICHITA.

Located on W 21st St N, our East Wichita facility is central to the metro. Easy access from central Wichita, Derby, and the south side.

Address: 7348 W 21st St N #124, Wichita, KS 67205

Phone: (316) 315-9190

Email: coachweber@epathlete.com

Start Training Here

SERVICES AVAILABLE

  • 1-on-1 Personal Training
  • Semi-Private Training (max 6)
  • Online Training
  • Body Composition Assessment
  • Nutrition Coaching
Start Today

TRAIN IN
EAST WICHITA.

Get Your Free Consultation

item.title: Sample Page
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
This is an example page. It's different from a blog post because it will stay in one place and will show up in your site navigation (in most themes). Most people start with an About page that introduces them to potential site visitors. It might say something like this:

Hi there! I'm a bike messenger by day, aspiring actor by night, and this is my website. I live in Los Angeles, have a great dog named Jack, and I like piña coladas. (And gettin' caught in the rain.)

...or something like this:

The XYZ Doohickey Company was founded in 1971, and has been providing quality doohickeys to the public ever since. Located in Gotham City, XYZ employs over 2,000 people and does all kinds of awesome things for the Gotham community.

As a new WordPress user, you should go to your dashboard to delete this page and create new pages for your content. Have fun!

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Wichita's Premier Personal Training

TRAIN
WITH
PURPOSE.

100% customized personal training across 3 Wichita-area locations.
Built for adults 35+ who are serious about results.

Start Training Today
Meet The Team

3

Locations

10+

Years Training

100%

Custom Programs

35+

Age Group Served

How We Train

THE WAY TO
GET RESULTS

01

SEMI-PRIVATE

Max 6 per session. Community energy with personalized coaching. The best of both worlds at a competitive price.

Learn More ?
Why EP Fitness

YOU'LL ALWAYS HAVE A COACH.

No guesswork. No generic plans. Every EP Fitness member gets a 100% customized program built around their goals, schedule, and fitness level ? with a real coach checking in every step of the way.

  • Comprehensive body assessment
  • 100% custom programming
  • Weekly coach check-ins
  • Nutrition guidance included
  • Progress tracked every session
  • Same coach, every session
  • No long-term contracts required
  • Free body comp assessment on Day 1
Real Results

Clients Who Showed Up.
Results That Speak.

These aren't before-and-after photos. These are people who decided to stop starting over ? and finally finished what they started.

?At 52 I thought my best days were behind me. Twelve months later I'm stronger than I was at 35. The coaches actually listen.?

DK

DIANE K.

Semi-Private Training ú Maize

Your Journey

From Your First Call to
Your Best Shape

We've built a simple 4-step system that removes all the guesswork. No trial and error. No generic plans. Just structured progress from day one.

01

FREE CONSULTATION

We sit down or hop on a call to understand your goals, history, and schedule. Zero pressure.

02

CUSTOM PROGRAM

Your coach builds your first training block around your body, limitations, and timeline. Nothing is a template.

03

COACHED SESSIONS

Train at one of our three Wichita-area locations. Every rep watched, corrected, and logged.

04

WEEKLY ADJUSTMENTS

Your program evolves with you. Weekly check-ins ensure your plan adapts as you get stronger ? no plateau.

Find Your Gym

3 LOCATIONS.
ONE COMMUNITY.

ANDOVER

618 N Andover Rd
Andover, KS 67002

View Location ?

MAIZE

Maize, Kansas
Wichita Metro Area

View Location ?

EAST WICHITA

7348 W 21st St N #124
Wichita, KS 67205

View Location ?
No Contracts. No Intimidation.

READY TO
CHANGE YOUR LIFE?

Call us at (316) 315-9190 or fill out our contact form. We'll build a custom program around your goals, schedule, and fitness level.

Get Your Free Consultation
(316) 315-9190
